articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Bitcoin faces fresh capitulation risk as 50K BTC moved at a loss
articles.description: Nearly 50,000 BTC shifted to exchanges at a loss while short-term Bitcoin holders' stress level reached 2-year highs. Is BTC headed toward new lows?

articles.title: Why a selloff in gold and silver is dragging bitcoin down
articles.description: Bitcoin has long been lumped in with precious metals as a hedge against a weakening dollar. That trade is unwinding on a hawkish Fed, and bitcoin is falling alongside the metals it was supposed to rival.

articles.title: DCG-backed Yuma launches fund offering institutional exposure to Bittensor
articles.description: The new investment vehicle arrives as asset managers expand TAO offerings and decentralized AI gains momentum following recent restrictions on Anthropic's models.

articles.title: Apple Vision Pro exec is reportedly leaving for OpenAI
articles.description: Paul Meade, the Apple vice president in charge of the Vision Pro headset, is reportedly leaving the company to join OpenAI’s hardware team.

articles.title: What Robinhood’s recent layoffs say about the current state of crypto investments
articles.description: Despite the trading platform’s restructuring and the wave of crypto companies making cuts, signaling a late bear market, Altcoin Pro’s Horst, Anderson and Zhuleku explain there’s no reason to panic.

articles.title: Coinbase, Circle underperform Big Tech as crypto stock slump deepens
articles.description: Coinbase and Circle have posted steeper losses than Oracle, Netflix and Salesforce, highlighting the widening gap between crypto equities and the broader market.

articles.title: NASA 選擇 Relativity Space 合作火星探測器任務，與 SpaceX 展開競賽
articles.description: NASA 17 日宣布，將與 Google 前董事長施密特（Eric Schmidt）掌舵的火箭公司 Rela […]

articles.title: Terzan 5 包含四代恆星族群，改寫銀河系核球形成歷史
articles.description: 位於銀河系核心核球區、距離地球約 1.9 萬光年的 Terzan 5，長期以來被視為一個典型的球狀星團。然而， […]

articles.title: 放棄百萬年薪也要逃離美國？AI 大老逆風揭密：矽谷仍是全球「最強吸鈔機」
articles.description: 美國爆發近年罕見的人口出走潮之際 Google 前傑出工程師、雲端資料公司 Rubrik 共同創辦人阿文德‧賈 […]

articles.title: Tether putting $23 billion gold stockpile to work with bullion-backed loans
articles.description: The stablecoin issuer is extending its tokenized gold strategy by allowing holders of XAUT to borrow against their bullion, mirroring bitcoin-backed lending without selling the underlying asset.

articles.title: Polymarket hack updated to $3.1 million days after the platform promised users full refunds
articles.description: The prediction markets giant is under investigation in connection with false or deceptive marketing practices, according to news reports.

articles.title: Coinbase and OKX try to lure in Binance’s EU users after it failed to secure a MiCA license
articles.description: Brian Armstrong of Coinbase and Star Xu of OKX offered new users sign up bonuses of up to 8% of their deposits or transfers from other accounts.

articles.title: The fittest founder in the room got cancer. Here’s how he used AI to fight back.
articles.description: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything tied tied to his regime — blood results, scan data, wearable output, journal entries — into Claude.

articles.title: Binance founder CZ blames crypto's sour 2026 on mix of AI, global tension, 4-year cycle
articles.description: There is no single cause for the crypto market's 50% decline over the past year, the Binance founder told CoinDesk.

articles.title: Strategy's valuation has fallen below the value of its bitcoin holdings
articles.description: For years, investors had valued the firm well above its bitcoin holdings, giving Strategy massive flexibility to raise capital as needed — a situation Michael Saylor and team took full advantage of.

articles.title: SecondFi targets two-week recovery after Cardano wallet exploit
articles.description: SecondFi says it has completed forensic investigations, taken a final balance snapshot and is preparing to return assets.

articles.title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
articles.description: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.

articles.title: 扛不住記憶體狂漲！蘋果試圖遊說白宮批准向中國軍工黑名單企業採購晶片

articles.description: 輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳日前預言代理式 AI（Agentic AI）時代正加速到來，企業將不再只是使用 […]
